summary: Iteration 118 - Category Search Templates (L1/L2 Landing Pages) Testing. All features verified working: L1 template renders with subcategories and showcase section, L2 template renders with dense filters and sibling categories, navigation between L1->L2 works correctly, generic search retains list/map toggle, category APIs return proper hierarchy.

issues: Shows loading spinner indefinitely when no showcase items exist - could show empty message faster

test_credentials: No auth required for public search pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Category search templates (L1/L2) fully functional. L1 template shows subcategory cards and showcase section. L2 template shows dense filters and sibling categories. Generic search page retains list/map toggle. Test file test_category_search_templates.py covers all category and search API endpoints.

l1_template_render.details: L1 template opens for /search?category=konut with data-testid='search-l1-template-root'

l2_template_render.details: L2 template opens for L2 categories with data-testid='search-l2-template-root'

l1_subcategory_section.details: Alt Kategoriler block renders correctly with 3 kategori count and clickable cards

l1_showcase_section.details: Bu Kategoride Vitrin İlanları section present with Tümünü Gör link, API correctly scoped to category

l2_dense_filter.details: L2 sidebar shows category filter, subcategories, and 'Aynı Seviyedeki Kategoriler' sibling section

category_template_default_view.details: Category templates use list (row) view by default, map/list toggle hidden on category templates

l1_l2_breadcrumb.details: Breadcrumb navigation shows full path (Ana Sayfa > Emlak > Konut > Satılık)

l1_to_l2_navigation.details: Clicking subcategory card navigates from L1 to L2 template correctly

generic_search_toggle.details: Generic search (no category) shows Liste/Harita toggle and both modes work

backend_categories_api.details: GET /api/categories returns proper hierarchy with L0, L1, L2 categories

backend_search_api.details: GET /api/v2/search works with category filter, showcase doping_type, sorting, pagination
